subject: Goliath from Disney's Gargoyles — large blue-purple gargoyle with spread wings standing on a Gothic rooftop
description: A large, imposing gargoyle — broad-shouldered blue-purple figure with massive bat-like wings spread wide and a long flowing tail — stands atop what appears to be a Gothic castle turret or rooftop environment at night. The figure looms forward in a protective stance with clawed hands slightly raised. A teal-green atmospheric glow lights the background, creating a moody nighttime urban-castle setting. Additional gargoyle silhouettes are visible in the background at smaller scale, suggesting the castle's broader population. The figure's muscular build and fierce forward gaze project both menace and guardian authority.
foreground: Large blue-purple gargoyle with spread wings and clawed hands
background: Gothic castle rooftop at night, teal atmospheric glow, gargoyle silhouettes
